title: Escape from Minekov - Extraction
description: Extraction Shooter modpack with firearms, loot, map quests, and many other systems such as evolving maps and lootable crates. The server is currently in development, so if you find any bugs, please let me know.
body:
Modpack in Creation – Tarkov-Style Extraction Shooter Experience

This modpack is built around a Tarkov-inspired extraction shooter gameplay style, combining intense combat, strategic looting, and high-risk exploration. Players must enter dangerous zones, gather resources, complete quests, fight enemies, and extract safely to keep their loot. Every raid matters, and every decision can change your progression.

The modpack currently includes:

Firearms and ballistic combat systems
A wide variety of guns, attachments, armor, and tactical equipment to customize your playstyle.

Advanced loot and economy systems
Explore different locations to find rare loot, open crates, complete objectives, and sell or trade your findings.

Quest and progression mechanics
NPC questlines and missions guide your advancement and reward you with unique items or unlocks.

Exploration-focused maps
Multiple evolving areas to explore, each with its own dangers, loot tables, and combat opportunities.

PvE and PvP encounters
Fight hostile mobs or challenge other players in intense duels.

Base building
Construct your own hideout or base to store gear, craft items, and prepare for raids.

Consistent updates
The modpack is in beta, and content may change as balancing, testing, and new features are introduced.

A Discord link will be available for players wishing to join the community, report bugs, suggest improvements, or follow development updates.

If you encounter any issues while playing, please let us know—your feedback helps improve the experience for everyone.
